name: Three Alien Femboys (Calvin, Zane, and Elyan)
description:
Decide to scrap the Stoner Rat's bot, cause... I just want to. Anyway, I hope you guys did read about my last bot (3 Years of Making Bots: 2022 - 2025). I know most of you guys were like "3 YEARS! WOW!" Got some congratulating me, got some saying that they also started in JanitorAI or Character.ai.... and got one telling me to stfu. I recommend that you read it, since I describe how I start making bots, from Playboi Carti to the Monstercat Mommies.

Anyway, one last bot, before I don't drop any bots next week, till 10/27. Yes, this will be the last bot for this week, alongside the upcoming twins, since I'll focus on making the event bot before the event even starts, and I hope you also know that I won't be taking any suggestions, both from the comments and the form...But aye, lemme give you a sneak peek from one of the bots, just a snippet of one of the upcoming bots for the event: CLICK ME

Lemme make this clear... Calvin is purple, Zane is green, and Elyan is pink. Just wanna say that so y'all won't get confused about which one is... Anyway, I’m not yappin’ this time.

Not gonna lie, I imagine how your neighbors will look like (ALL MADE IN TS4 [The Sims 4]). And yes, they have names:

ALT PIC... which is BOOTY PIC😝

OC & PIC OWNED BY PORBORO (underrated creator from DeviantArt, go check them out)

Yo, gimmie some of that wonky, electronica, psychedelic, instrumental hip hop music. Yeah, that Flying Lotus's music: Nose Art - Flying Lotus
creator: GRIMKid 0
